# Factory & Instance Registration

## Factory Method

Register a service using a factory method:

```csharp
[IoCRegister<IMyService>(Factory = nameof(MyServiceFactory.Create))]
internal class MyService : IMyService;

public static class MyServiceFactory
{
    // Must be static
    public static IMyService Create()
    {
        return new MyService();
    }
}
```

<details>
<summary>Generated Code</summary>

```csharp
// <auto-generated/>
services.AddSingleton<global::MyNamespace.MyService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => (global::MyNamespace.MyService)global::MyNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create());
services.AddSingleton<global::MyNamespace.IMyService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => global::MyNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create());
```

</details>

### Factory with IServiceProvider

When the factory method has an `IServiceProvider` parameter, the generator passes it automatically:

```csharp
[IoCRegister<IMyService>(Factory = nameof(MyServiceFactory.Create))]
internal class MyService : IMyService;

public static class MyServiceFactory
{
    public static IMyService Create(IServiceProvider sp)
    {
        var logger = sp.GetRequiredService<ILogger>();
        return new MyService(logger);
    }
}
```

<details>
<summary>Generated Code</summary>

```csharp
// <auto-generated/>
services.AddSingleton<global::MyNamespace.MyService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => (global::MyNamespace.MyService)global::MyNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp));
services.AddSingleton<global::MyNamespace.IMyService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => global::MyNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp));
```

</details>

### Factory with Keyed Service

For keyed services, the factory can receive both `IServiceProvider` and the `key`:

```csharp
[IoCRegister<IMyService>(
    ServiceLifetime.Scoped,
    Factory = nameof(MyServiceFactory.Create),
    Key = "myKey")]
internal class MyService : IMyService;

public static class MyServiceFactory
{
    public static IMyService Create(IServiceProvider sp, object? key)
    {
        return new MyService(key?.ToString());
    }
}
```

<details>
<summary>Generated Code</summary>

```csharp
// <auto-generated/>
services.AddKeyedScoped<global::MyNamespace.MyService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => (global::MyNamespace.MyService)global::MyNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp, key));
services.AddKeyedScoped<global::MyNamespace.IMyService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => global::MyNamespace.MyServiceFactory.Create(sp, key));
```

</details>

## Static Instance

Register a static instance (only allows `Singleton` lifetime):

```csharp
[IoCRegister<IMyService>(Instance = nameof(Default))]
internal class MyService : IMyService
{
    public static readonly MyService Default = new();
}
```

<details>
<summary>Generated Code</summary>

```csharp
// <auto-generated/>
services.AddSingleton<global::MyNamespace.MyService>(global::MyNamespace.MyService.Default);
services.AddSingleton<global::MyNamespace.IMyService>(global::MyNamespace.MyService.Default);
```

</details>

### Instance with Keyed Service

```csharp
[IoCRegister<IMyService>(Instance = nameof(Default), Key = "myKey")]
internal class MyService : IMyService
{
    public static readonly MyService Default = new();
}
```

<details>
<summary>Generated Code</summary>

```csharp
// <auto-generated/>
services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::MyNamespace.MyService>("myKey", global::MyNamespace.MyService.Default);
services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::MyNamespace.IMyService>("myKey", global::MyNamespace.MyService.Default);
```

</details>

> [!NOTE]  
> When using `Instance`, only `Singleton` lifetime is allowed. Using `Scoped` or `Transient` will not generate any registration code.

## Combined Example

```csharp
[IoCRegister(
    RegisterAllInterfaces = true,
    Factory = nameof(Factory.Create),
    Key = "special")]
internal class SpecialService : IService;

public static class Factory
{
    public static SpecialService Create()
    {
        return new SpecialService();
    }
}
```

<details>
<summary>Generated Code</summary>

```csharp
// <auto-generated/>
services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::MyNamespace.SpecialService>("special",(global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => (global::MyNamespace.SpecialService)global::MyNamespace.Factory.Create());
services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::MyNamespace.IService>("special", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => global::MyNamespace.Factory.Create());
```

</details>
